final:
// // This module implements a negative edge triggered D flip-flop with an AND gate input.
module top_module (
	input clk,
	input g,
	input h,
	input i,
	input j,
	output reg out);

	initial
		out = 0;

	always@(posedge clk) begin
		out <= g & h & i & j;
	end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a negative edge triggered D flip-flop with an AND gate input.
